title: pentacalia sonsonensis
intro: Pentacalia sonsonensis, also known as Sonso pentacalia, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to Colombia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pentacalia sonsonensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, wounds, and respiratory issues.
